prompt: Create a polished shoujo-anime beauty illustration of a young woman applying glossy coral red lipstick, with the lipstick color perfectly matching her lips. The image is a vertical 3:4 close-up portrait on a bright cream-white vanity background. Center the subject from chest up: a delicate fair-skinned girl with large sparkling brown eyes, long lashes, soft peach blush, small glossy lips, and long honey-brown hair with straight bangs and luminous fine strands. She wears small gold stud earrings and an off-shoulder sheer white ruffled blouse with tiny dotted texture. Her right hand holds one open gold-and-black lipstick tube close to her lower lip; her nails are almond-shaped and painted soft coral pink. Surround her with an elegant cosmetics flat-lay: exactly 1 large rectangular eyeshadow/blush palette behind her on the left, with a gold frame and a grid of 56 square pans in warm neutrals, peaches, pinks, reds, browns, and creams; exactly 18 additional visible lipstick tubes arranged around both edges of the image, mostly red and pink shades in gold, black, and clear packaging; exactly 2 mascara wands or slim black cosmetic tubes on the left lower side; exactly 3 small compact or mini palette items on the right side; exactly 2 fluffy round powder puffs near the bottom corners. Use warm sunlight, glossy highlights, soft bloom, crisp linework, elegant magazine beauty-ad composition, high-detail anime rendering, luminous skin, reflective metallic makeup packaging, and a romantic clean cosmetic aesthetic. Keep the palette and lip color harmonious, avoid text, logos, watermarks, extra fingers, distorted hands, or mismatched lipstick color.
